chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-908 of 2026 (Abu Talha Roomi & others v. Province of Sindh and others) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: order with signature(s) of Judge(s) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of C.M.A. No.3716 of 2026. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 26.03.2026. Mr. Muhamamd Zohaib Tanoli, advocate for the petitioners. Ms. Rehmat-u-Nisa, advocate for KDA. ---------- The petitioners, retired from KDA from 2021 onwards, seek disposal of this petition in terms of the common order dated 18.02.2026 in CP No.D-815 of 2023 and connected petitions. Although KDA counsel seeks time to file comments, since six weeks previously granted for compliance vide order dated 19.02.2026 remain unfulfilled. Considering that this Court has already disposed similar petitions granting two months for payment of dues, this petition is disposed of in the same terms, allowing two months for release of all outstanding pensionary and post-retirement benefits after proper verification and subject to their entitlement under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Manthar Brohi
